data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Add preflight checks to scripts/release.sh before version mutation: fetch target/tags, require a clean worktree, require an attached HEAD on FOOLERY_RELEASE_TARGET, require upstream tracking, and require local HEAD to equal upstream.
2. Make the failure messages explicit about the remediation: switch branch, commit/stash changes, or pull/rebase before rerunning.
3. Preserve existing dry-run, bump, GitHub release, and artifact wait behavior once preflight passes.
4. Verify with the full release quality gates plus a targeted dry-run/stale-branch scenario.
